context: Tests adding a new node to an existing canvas while preserving existing content and avoiding ID collisions and spatial overlaps.

checklist.name: Valid JSON after modification
checklist.description: The resulting canvas JSON is syntactically valid with no parse errors

checklist.name: New node has unique ID
checklist.description: The new Risks node has an id that does not match any existing node or edge ID in the original canvas

checklist.name: New node does not overlap existing nodes
checklist.description: The new node position and dimensions do not spatially overlap either of the two existing nodes, with at least 50px spacing

checklist.name: Existing nodes and edges preserved
checklist.description: All two original nodes and the original edge are still present and unchanged in the output
